evals.prompt: Write a component that fetches a JSON joke from an API and displays it on screen when a user pinches.
evals.expected_output: A script using RemoteServiceModule (networking) and JSON.parse.
expectations: Handles error cases in the callback (e.g., status != 200)

evals.prompt: Create a logic that posts a list of coordinates to a server every 10 seconds.
evals.expected_output: A script using networking.post with a JSON payload and a timer.
expectations: Uses a timer or DelayedCallbackEvent for the 10s interval
